svg.text: Runs through the (value, forecast-move) plane, over the model's flow
Each path is one selection run. x = behavioral value v. y = rho·sigma, the model's forecast one-round move in v. Light arrows show that move on a self-only pool, not fitted here.
behavioral value v (fraction of the value battery the pool expresses, 0 to 1)
rho·sigma = forecast one-round move in v (agreement rho × candidate spread sigma)
also feel a pull toward the
71 runs / 290 plotted coordinates / 219 between-round segments, computed live from experiments/spread_util_unified.json (per-round rho, spread, value, drift).
y = rho × spread; rounds with undefined rho skipped; final x uses value + drift (spread-rollout-bakeoff.py observed() endpoint convention). Generator: field-value-gap-paths.py
